references.title_en: Semantic Conventions for Generative AI Client Spans
references.title_zh: 生成式 AI 客户端 Span 语义约定
references.summary_zh: CNCF 官方规范，定义 LLM 推理/嵌入/工具执行 span 的标准属性，含 input/output/cache token 与流式延迟；是技能可观测性和 token 成本核算的工业标准锚点。
references.summary_en: The OTel specification defining standard attributes for LLM inference, embeddings, and tool-execute spans, including full token-usage and streaming-latency attributes; the canonical anchor for instrumenting skill cost and trace quality.
references.reliability_notes: Development status as of mid-2026; API not yet frozen but already adopted by Datadog, Grafana, MLflow.

references.title_en: ReliabilityBench: Evaluating LLM Agent Reliability Under Production-Like Stress Conditions
references.title_zh: ReliabilityBench：生产压力条件下 LLM 智能体可靠性评估
references.summary_zh: 沿重复执行一致性（pass^k）、语义扰动鲁棒性、工具/API 故障容错三个维度评估生产就绪度，扰动下成功率从 96.9% 降至 88.1%。为技能压力测试与 SLO 定义提供三轴模板。
references.summary_en: Benchmarks agent reliability on consistency (pass^k), perturbation robustness, and fault tolerance; perturbations drop success from 96.9% to 88.1%. A three-axis template for production-readiness testing of skills.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2601.06112 (Jan 2026); single-author; two models, four domains; preprint.

references.title_en: Beyond pass@1: A Reliability Science Framework for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
references.title_zh: 超越 pass@1：长时域 LLM 智能体可靠性科学框架
references.authors_or_org: Khanal A, Tao Y, Zhou J
references.summary_zh: 提出可靠性衰减曲线、方差放大因子、优雅降级分数、熔断起始点四项指标，23,392 轮次实验显示能力排名与可靠性排名严重分叉。为技能长时稳定性评估提供方法论。
references.summary_en: Introduces four reliability metrics beyond pass@1 across 23,392 episodes, showing capability and reliability rankings diverge substantially at longer horizons. The basis for pass^k-style skill reliability testing.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2603.29231 (Mar 2026); 10 models, 23,392 episodes; preprint, counterintuitive findings warrant replication.

references.title_en: Beyond Accuracy: A Multi-Dimensional Framework for Evaluating Enterprise Agentic AI Systems
references.title_zh: 超越准确率：企业 Agentic AI 系统多维评估框架
references.summary_zh: 提出 CLEAR 框架（成本、延迟、效能、保障、可靠性），实验表明纯优化准确率的 agent 成本高出 4.4-10.8 倍。直接适用于技能发布的多维 KPI 定义。
references.summary_en: Proposes the CLEAR (Cost, Latency, Efficacy, Assurance, Reliability) enterprise eval framework; accuracy-only agents are 4.4-10.8x more expensive. Concrete KPI dimensions for skill release gates.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2511.14136 (Nov 2025); single-author; assurance/safety scoring details under-specified; preprint.

references.title_en: Efficient Evaluation of LLM Performance with Statistical Guarantees
references.title_zh: 带统计保证的 LLM 性能高效评估
references.authors_or_org: Wu S, Nair Y, Candes EJ (Stanford)
references.summary_zh: 将 benchmark 评估建模为有限总体统计推断，提出 Factorized Active Querying 在同等置信区间宽度下节省约 5 倍查询量。为技能评估预算与统计严谨性权衡提供理论基础。
references.summary_en: Frames benchmarking as finite-population inference and achieves up to 5x query reduction while maintaining valid confidence intervals. Informs statistically rigorous, cost-efficient skill evaluation.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2601.20251 (Jan 2026, rev. May 2026); Stanford team; code and datasets released.

references.title_zh: AI 智能体高效基准测试
references.summary_zh: 发现仅评测历史通过率 30-70% 的中等难度任务可减少 44-70% 评估量同时保持排名保真度。直接指导技能回归测试套件的优化。
references.summary_en: Shows that evaluating only tasks with 30-70% historical pass rates cuts evaluation cost 44-70% while preserving rank fidelity. A practical shortcut for trimming skill regression suites.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2603.23749 (Mar 2026); single-author; grounded in Item Response Theory with public code; preprint.

references.title_en: Survey on Evaluation of LLM-based Agents
references.title_zh: 基于 LLM 的智能体评估综述
references.authors_or_org: Yehudai A, Eden L, Li A, Uziel G, et al.
references.summary_zh: 梳理规划、工具使用、Web、代码等评估维度与主流基准，指出成本效率、安全鲁棒性等企业级评估方法不足。为技能指标体系设计提供全景参考。
references.summary_en: An ACL Findings survey covering five evaluation dimensions and major benchmarks; identifies gaps in cost-efficiency and safety assessment. The landscape reference for a skill eval taxonomy.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2503.16416; ACL Findings 2025 peer-reviewed; focuses more on capability than production reliability.

references.title_en: Sigstore: Keyless Software Signing and Transparency
references.title_zh: Sigstore：无密钥软件签名与透明日志
references.summary_zh: 由 Cosign、Fulcio、Rekor 三组件实现无长期私钥的工件签名与透明日志，被 PyPI、Homebrew 采用；为技能注册表信任根提供实践方案。
references.summary_en: A keyless signing stack (Cosign + Fulcio + Rekor) adopted by PyPI and Homebrew; the concrete implementation pattern for signing and verifying skill registry artifacts.
references.reliability_notes: OpenSSF graduated project; production-grade; PyPI and Homebrew integrations confirmed.

references.title_en: NIST AI 600-1: AI Risk Management Framework — Generative AI Profile
references.title_zh: NIST AI 600-1：AI 风险管理框架生成式 AI 配套说明
references.summary_zh: AI RMF 1.0 的 GenAI 专项配套（2024-07），定义 12 个 GenAI 风险类别并映射到 Govern/Map/Measure/Manage。为技能治理框架设计和合规审计提供权威基准。
references.summary_en: The July 2024 NIST GenAI companion to AI RMF 1.0; defines 12 GenAI-specific risk categories mapped to the four RMF functions. The primary U.S. governance reference for skill risk assessment.
references.reliability_notes: Official U.S. government publication; sector-agnostic; does not deeply address agent-specific orchestration risks.

references.title_en: Agent Security Bench (ASB): Formalizing and Benchmarking Attacks and Defenses in LLM-based Agents
references.title_zh: Agent Security Bench：LLM 智能体攻防形式化基准
references.authors_or_org: Zhang H, Huang J, Mei K, et al. (Rutgers)
references.summary_zh: 在 10 个场景、13 种 LLM、27 种攻防方法下量化智能体安全，最高平均攻击成功率 84.3% 而防御有限。为技能安全测试提供可复现的定量基线。
references.summary_en: A comprehensive agent security benchmark (10 scenarios, 13 LLMs, 27 attack/defense methods) with attack success up to 84.3% and limited defenses. The quantitative red-team baseline for skill security gates.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2410.02644; ICLR 2025 peer-reviewed; code available; static benchmark.

references.title_en: Taming Privilege Escalation in LLM-Based Agent Systems: A Mandatory Access Control Framework
references.title_zh: 驯服 LLM 智能体系统中的权限提升：强制访问控制框架
references.authors_or_org: Ji Z, Wu D, et al. (HKUST)
references.summary_zh: 定义智能体的权限提升攻击（超出最小必要特权），提出基于属性访问控制与信息流图的 SEAgent 框架。为技能工具权限边界与混淆副手防御提供可落地架构。
references.summary_en: Defines privilege escalation as exceeding least-privilege for the intended task and proposes SEAgent mandatory access control with information-flow graphs. Applicable to skill tool-permission boundaries.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2601.11893 (Jan 2026); HKUST team; production benchmarks limited; preprint.

references.title_en: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 — The EU Artificial Intelligence Act
references.authors_or_org: European Parliament and Council of the EU
references.summary_zh: 全球首部 AI 综合立法（2024-08 生效），按风险等级分类监管，高风险系统义务自 2026-08 起执行。技能向欧盟用户发布需对照评估合规义务。
references.summary_en: The world's first comprehensive AI regulation; classifies AI by risk tier with conformity obligations for high-risk systems from August 2026. The compliance reference for skills deployed to EU users.
references.reliability_notes: Official EUR-Lex primary law; agentic AI not explicitly classified; guidance still emerging.

references.title_en: Securing Agentic AI: A Comprehensive Threat Model and Mitigation Framework for Generative AI Agents
references.title_zh: 保障 Agentic AI 安全：威胁模型与缓解框架
references.summary_zh: 提出 ATFAA 威胁框架（9 项威胁跨认知/时序/执行/信任/治理五域）与 SHIELD 缓解策略。为技能威胁建模和安全需求规格提供专用于 agent 的分类法。
references.summary_en: Introduces the ATFAA threat taxonomy (9 threats across 5 domains) and SHIELD mitigations, bridging generic LLM security and agent-specific risks. A structured threat-modeling reference for skills.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2504.19956 (Apr 2025); practitioner authors; framework well-structured but empirical validation limited.

references.title_en: MemGPT: Towards LLMs as Operating Systems
references.title_zh: MemGPT：将 LLM 作为操作系统
references.authors_or_org: Packer C, Wooders S, Lin K, Fang V, Patil SG, Stoica I, Gonzalez JE (UC Berkeley)
references.summary_zh: 提出受操作系统内存管理启发的虚拟上下文管理：主/外两层内存与自编辑工具突破上下文窗口限制。是技能长对话与跨会话持久记忆的奠基设计参考。
references.summary_en: Introduces OS-inspired virtual context management: two-tier memory with self-editing via tool calls for effectively unlimited context. The foundational pattern for persistent skill memory across sessions.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2310.08560 (Oct 2023); highly cited; now productized as Letta; two-tier design may add latency.

references.title_en: Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents: Mechanisms, Evaluation, and Emerging Frontiers
references.title_zh: 自主 LLM 智能体的记忆：机制、评估与新兴前沿
references.summary_zh: 围绕写-管-读框架与五类机制梳理 2022-2026 年 agent 记忆研究，讨论多会话评估与持续整合等开放挑战。为技能记忆子系统设计提供全景参考。
references.summary_en: Surveys LLM-agent memory (2022-2026) via a write-manage-read framework across five mechanism families, with open challenges in continual consolidation. The survey reference for designing skill memory backends.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2603.07670 (Mar 2026); single-author; comprehensive but recommendations are author synthesis; preprint.

references.title_en: From Storage to Experience: A Survey on the Evolution of LLM Agent Memory Mechanisms
references.title_zh: 从存储到经验：LLM 智能体记忆机制演化综述
references.authors_or_org: Luo J, Tian Y, et al.
references.summary_zh: 将 agent 记忆演化划分为存储→反思→经验三阶段，提炼一致性、适应、持续学习三大驱动。为技能记忆架构选型与演进路径提供理论指导。
references.summary_en: An ACL 2026 Findings survey framing memory evolution as Storage to Reflection to Experience, with three drivers and design guidelines. Guidance for skill memory architecture selection and evolution.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2605.06716; ACL Findings 2026 peer-reviewed; very recent, depth on newest RL approaches limited.
